projects.project_name: Providing of Safety and Co-ordination Service for project work at NSCBIA, Kolkata
scope_of_work: Providing safety and co-ordination service for project work

amendments.details: Provisional extension granted without prejudice to the right of Airports Authority of India to recover liquidated damages as per contract clause

strength_indicators: Project executed for Airports Authority of India

important_clauses: Extension granted without prejudice to recovery of liquidated damages
Time shall continue to be the essence of the agreement

raw_text.content: Provisional Extension of Time issued by Airports Authority of India dated 18 Dec 2017 for providing safety and co-ordination service for project work at NSCBIA Kolkata. Original completion date 19.09.2017 extended till 31.03.2018. Extension granted without prejudice to recovery of liquidated damages as per contract clause.
